arg.name: timer
arg.description: Publish timer period [sec]. If <= 0, data-driven publish is used.

arg.name: set_itf_3axis_sensor1
arg.description: Set ITF coefficients on start (3axis mode, sensor 1).

arg.name: set_itf_3axis_sensor2
arg.description: Set ITF coefficients on start (3axis mode, sensor 2).

arg.name: set_itf_6axis
arg.description: Set ITF coefficients on start (6axis mode).

arg.name: param_file
arg.description: YAML file name (in the tecgihan_driver package 'config' folder) that contains FS/ITF coefficients ('fs_list' and, depending on sensor_mode, 'itf_3axis_sensor1_list' / 'itf_3axis_sensor2_list' / 'itf_6axis_list') under 'ros__parameters'.

arg.name: param_path
arg.description: Full path to the YAML file that contains FS/ITF coefficients. Defaults to param_file inside the package 'config' folder. Set this explicitly to use a YAML file outside the package (takes precedence over param_file). Must point to an existing file, or launch will fail; if you don't need to load a coefficients file, use dpa06b_ros_launch.py instead, which skips a missing file safely.

arg.name: serial_no
arg.description: Device serial number to distinguish between multiple amplifiers.

arg.name: location
arg.description: Device location like '1-2' to distinguish between multiple amplifiers.

arg.name: node_name
arg.description: ROS Node name. Change this when running multiple amplifiers simultaneously.
